name: openfeelz
description: Emotional model with personality-influenced decay, rumination, and multi-agent awareness for Claude Code

decayPreset.title: Decay Preset
decayPreset.description: slow (time-based ~12h half-life), fast (time-based ~1h), or turn (turn-based, ~5 turns to baseline)

agentEmotions.title: Agent Emotional Model
agentEmotions.description: Enable the agent's own emotional state with PAD dimensions, personality, and decay

userEmotions.title: User Emotion Classification
userEmotions.description: Classify emotions from the user's messages and include in context

syncUserClassification.title: Synchronous User Classification
syncUserClassification.description: When user emotions are on: classify synchronously (current-turn, ~1s latency) vs async (one turn behind)
